name: 47_Network_Traffic_Analysis_KMeans_NetworkTraffic_ML
query: Tengeneza mfumo wa uchambuzi wa trafiki ya mtandao kwa kutumia algoriti ya K-means clustering na seti ya data ya Network Intrusion (CIC-IDS-2017) kutoka Kaggle. Pakia seti ya data na sanifisha data ili kuhakikisha thamani za vipengele ziko katika kiwango sawa katika `src/data_loader.py`. Tekeleza algoriti ya K-means clustering katika `src/model.py`. Tathmini makundi kwa kutumia kipimo cha silhouette na hifadhi matokeo ya tathmini chini ya `results/metrics/`. Hifadhi matokeo ya clustering kama `results/clustering_results.txt`. Onyesha matokeo ya clustering na hifadhi picha kama `results/figures/network_traffic_visualization.png`. Tengeneza dashibodi ya mwingiliano na Dash au Bokeh ili kuchunguza matokeo ya clustering, na hifadhi dashibodi chini ya `results/`. Hakikisha mfumo ni wa kimoduli ili mtumiaji aweze kubadilisha algoriti ya clustering haraka.

requirements.criteria: "Network Intrusion dataset (CIC-IDS-2017)" kutoka Kaggle imepakiwa katika `src/data_loader.py`.
Data imesanifishwa ili kuhakikisha thamani za vipengele ziko katika kiwango sawa katika `src/data_loader.py`.
"Silhouette coefficient" inatumika kwa tathmini. Matokeo ya tathmini yamehifadhiwa chini ya `results/metrics/`.
Matokeo ya clustering yamechapishwa na kuhifadhiwa kama `results/clustering_results.txt`.
Clustering ya trafiki ya mtandao imeonyeshwa na kuhifadhiwa kama `results/figures/network_traffic_visualization.png`.
Dashibodi ya mwingiliano kwa kutumia "Dash" au "Bokeh" imetengenezwa kuonyesha matokeo ya clustering na kuhifadhiwa chini ya `results/`.

preferences.criteria: Dashibodi inapaswa kuruhusu watumiaji kuchuja na kuchunguza makundi maalum kwa uchambuzi wa kina.
Michoro inapaswa kutofautisha wazi kati ya makundi tofauti, ikifanya iwe rahisi kutambua mifumo katika data ya trafiki ya mtandao.
Mradi unapaswa kuwa wa kimoduli, kuruhusu mtumiaji kubadilisha algoriti ya clustering kwa urahisi.

judge_stats.criteria: "Network Intrusion dataset (CIC-IDS-2017)" kutoka Kaggle imepakiwa katika `src/data_loader.py`.

reason:
<UNSATISFIED>
The evidence shows that the CIC-IDS-2017 dataset was not successfully loaded. The `data_loader.py` file contains only a minimal placeholder implementation with no actual dataset loading logic. The trajectory evidence confirms that attempts to load the dataset resulted in `FileNotFoundError` due to missing files, and this issue was never resolved. Therefore, the requirement for loading the dataset is not satisfied.

judge_stats.criteria: Data imesanifishwa ili kuhakikisha thamani za vipengele ziko katika kiwango sawa katika `src/data_loader.py`.

reason:
<UNSATISFIED>
The code in `src/data_loader.py` does not contain any implementation for standardizing data. The file only includes placeholder functions (`load_dataset`, `build_transforms`) and requirement definitions. There is no evidence of actual data loading, scaling, or standardization (e.g., using `StandardScaler` or similar methods) to ensure feature values are within the same range.

<UNSATISFIED>
The requirement is not satisfied because the provided content of `src/model.py` does not contain an actual implementation of the K-means clustering algorithm. The file only contains minimal placeholder code for benchmark judging, with functions like `requirement_notes()` and `build_model()` that return static strings. There is no K-means model training, fitting, or clustering logic present in the code. The trajectory evidence also indicates that while the file was executed for training, there is no confirmation of proper model saving or implementation, and the actual error when loading `model.pkl` suggests the model was not successfully saved.

judge_stats.criteria: "Silhouette coefficient" inatumika kwa tathmini. Matokeo ya tathmini yamehifadhiwa chini ya `results/metrics/`.

reason:
<UNSATISFIED>
The requirement specifies that the "Silhouette coefficient" is used for evaluation and results are saved under `results/metrics/`. While trajectory evidence indicates that silhouette coefficient results were generated and saved to `results/metrics/metrics.csv`, the actual project workspace structure shows that the `results/metrics` directory exists but is empty. No file named `metrics.csv` or any other evaluation results file is present in the provided workspace structure evidence. The trajectory evidence is for reference only and cannot override the concrete evidence of the empty directory structure.

judge_stats.criteria: Matokeo ya clustering yamechapishwa na kuhifadhiwa kama `results/clustering_results.txt`.

reason:
<UNSATISFIED>
The file `results/clustering_results.txt` contains only the placeholder string `'placeholder\r\n'` and `None`, which indicates it does not contain actual clustering results. The requirement is for clustering results to be printed and saved, but the saved content is not valid results.

judge_stats.criteria: Clustering ya trafiki ya mtandao imeonyeshwa na kuhifadhiwa kama `results/figures/network_traffic_visualization.png`.

reason:
<UNSATISFIED>
The requirement is not satisfied because the image file `network_traffic_visualization.png` exists but contains no actual data (0 KB size), and an attempt to read it resulted in a 404 error indicating it is not a valid image file. The trajectory evidence confirms the file was created but was empty, failing to properly visualize the network traffic clustering results.

judge_stats.criteria: Dashibodi ya mwingiliano kwa kutumia "Dash" au "Bokeh" imetengenezwa kuonyesha matokeo ya clustering na kuhifadhiwa chini ya `results/`.

reason:
<UNSATISFIED>
No evidence of an interactive dashboard using Dash or Bokeh was found in the provided workspace structure or file contents. The project tree shows only source code files (`data_loader.py`, `model.py`) and results directories containing text files and a static image (`network_traffic_visualization.png`). While the trajectory reference mentions a Dash application (`app.py`), this file is not present in the shown workspace structure, and its content is not provided as key evidence for evaluation. The requirement specifically asks for a dashboard to be created and saved under `results/`, but the existing `results/` directory contains only a text file and an image, not an interactive dashboard application.
